description: Readiness Manifest — the outer-ring capability deltas that make Tracer a product. Each entry is a delta with a Ring, the grade where the CLIs leave it (seed), the product-grade target, the lab that promotes it, and a machine-checkable `check` (scripts/readiness/checks/<id>.mjs, exit 0 = product-grade). Assembled, this manifest IS the Production Readiness Review. Run via `npm run readiness`.

deltas.productGrade: Readiness charter: SLOs + critical workflows + delta inventory
deltas.check: charter parses; SLOs + both critical workflows present
no literal config; boots from env alone
gitleaks clean; app reads secret from env (fails if unset)

deltas.productGrade: synchronize:false, migrations-only, containerized, stateless, survives restart
deltas.check: synchronize:false; migration is the only schema path; kill+restart → no data loss
logs parse as JSON; request id present

deltas.productGrade: integration vs testcontainer + 2 E2E (Playwright/BDD) + coverage floor + mutation
deltas.check: suite green; coverage ≥ floor; Stryker ≥ floor; breaking a workflow fails an E2E
act blocks a red commit; DORA emitted

deltas.productGrade: dev + prod parity, promotion path, feature flag
deltas.check: same image promotes dev→prod; flag toggles release w/o redeploy
destroy+apply reproduces; manual change flagged as drift
'healthy?' answered from dashboard; synthetic SLO burn fires alert

deltas.productGrade: rollback path, runbook, blameless postmortem, error budget
deltas.check: injected failure detected via R10, rolled back via R07; TTR recorded; postmortem present

deltas.seedGrade: dev-grade — Zod+JWT; throttler unconfigured; no SSRF/redirect guard
deltas.productGrade: scheme allowlist, SSRF guard, rate limiting, ASVS pass
deltas.check: exploit kit returns 4xx; rate-limit 429; ASVS complete

deltas.productGrade: pinned deps, SBOM, dep-scan gates the pipeline
deltas.check: lockfile pinned; SBOM emitted; pipeline blocks a known-vuln dep

deltas.productGrade: full PRR passes; every delta product-grade
